nodes.name: Verify HMAC Signature
nodes.notes: Verifies HMAC-SHA256 signature from GoWater. Skips verification in dev mode (no secret configured). Throws error on invalid signature to halt the pipeline.

parameters.text:
=*Break Started*

*Employee:* {{ $json.data.employeeName }} ({{ $json.data.employeeId }})
*Date:* {{ $json.data.date }}
*Break Start:* {{ new Date(new Date($json.data.breakStartTime || $json.timestamp).getTime() + (8*60*60*1000)).toISOString().substring(11,16) }} PHT

nodes.name: Valid Attendance Event?
nodes.notes: Rejects non-attendance events early to prevent unexpected data in the pipeline
